title: platform.agent.kill-switch.toggled payload (v1)
description: Emitted when a super-admin flips an agent kill switch platform-wide. Producer: billing-service (apps/billing-service/src/routes/platform.ts). PLATFORM-SCOPED: subject is `platform.agent.kill-switch.toggled` and the envelope tenantId is null. This is the ONE event whose payload legitimately has NO tenantId — it is genuinely platform-wide (affects every tenant), and the multi-tenancy mandate does not apply to a platform-scoped kill switch. Rides the PLATFORM_EVENTS stream.
x-consumers: notification-service (SYSTEM notice to all SUPER_ADMINs via in_app + slack)

reason.description: Reason for the toggle, or null.

actorUserId.description: Super-admin who flipped it, or null.
